from __future__ import annotations


def repeated_key_hash_via_dict_lookup_in_tight_loop_positive(values: list[str]) -> dict[str, int]:
    counts: dict[str, int] = {}
    for value in values:
        if value in counts:
            counts[value] = counts[value] + 1
        else:
            counts[value] = 1
    return counts
